REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK N.A. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ADDRESS ALL ISSUES RAISED BY DEMURRER. DEFENSE COUNSEL STATES THAT THERE HAS BEEN A DISMISSAL FILED IN THIS CASE REGARDING THEIR CLIENT. HOWEVER, IT HAS NOT BEEN PRESENTED TO JUDGE ROBERTSON AND IS NOT LOCATED IN THE IJS SYSTEM AS OF YET. JUDGE ROBERTSON ORDERS COUNSEL TO WAIT FOUR OR FIVE DAYS TO ALLOW TIME FOR THE DISMISSAL TO BE UPLOADED INTO THE SYSTEM. IF IT IS STILL NOT THERE THEN COUNSEL IS TO SUBMIT AN ORDER ADOPTING THE TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED.

MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Attorney Kristapor Vartanian for the Defendant JP MOrgan Chase Bank N.A. the moving party. No Appearance by the opposing party.

DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK N.A. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend to address all issues raised by demurrer.

Defense Counsel states that there has been a dismissal filed in this case regarding their client. However, it has not been presented to Judge Robertson and is not located in the IJS system as of yet. Judge Robertson orders Counsel to wait four or five days to allow time for the dismissal to be uploaded into the system. If it is still not there then Counsel is to submit an order adopting the tentative ruling. Judge A. James Robertson II, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)
